languages.text: "Я верю тебе, Альва-9. Артизан Декабалус тоже показался мне подозрительным".
"I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."
languages.original_text: "Я верю тебе, Альва-9. Артизан Декабалус тоже показался мне подозрительным".

traits.locale_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."
"I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."
"I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

languages.text: 「アルバ9、君の言うことは信じている。職人デカバルスも、私にも怪しかった」
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

traits.locale_text: 「アルバ9、君の言うことは信じている。職人デカバルスも、私にも怪しかったわ。」

languages.text: «Le creo, Alva-9. El artesano Decabalus también me parecía sospechoso a mí».
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

traits.locale_text: «Le creo, Alva-9. El artesano Decabalus también me parecía sospechoso a mí».

languages.text: “我相信你，阿尔瓦-9。匠人德卡巴洛斯在我看来也很可疑。”
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

traits.locale_text: “我相信你，阿尔瓦-9。匠人德卡巴洛斯在我看来也很可疑。”

languages.text: "Ich glaube Euch, Alva-9. Ich fand Artifex Decabalus auch verdächtig."
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

traits.locale_text: "Ich glaube Euch, Alva-9. Ich fand Artifex Decabalus auch verdächtig."

languages.text: "Sana inanıyorum Alva-9. Zanaatkâr Decabalus bana da şüpheli göründü."
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

traits.locale_text: "Sana inanıyorum Alva-9. Zanaatkâr Decabalus bana da şüpheli göründü."

languages.text: « Je vous crois, Alva-9. J'ai également trouvé l'artisan Décabalus particulièrement suspect. »
languages.original_text: "I believe you, Alva-9. Artisan Decabalus seemed suspicious to me as well."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous crois, Alva-9. J'ai également trouvé l'artisan Décabalus particulièrement suspect. »
